name: Chinese Vegetable Miso Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 5 cups of vegetable stock to a boil.
2. Lower the heat and add sesame oil, celery, carrot, and garlic. Cover and simmer over low heat for 10 minutes.
3. Cook the noodles separately until just done (al dente). Drain and set aside.
4. Add turnip and white parts of scallions to the stock pot. Simmer for 5 minutes.
5. Add the remaining ingredients except tofu, miso, and noodles, and simmer, covered, until cooked.
6. Add the noodles and tofu. Remove from heat.
7. Dissolve miso in 1/2 cup warm water. Stir into soup. Serve immediately.
